nodes.name: architect-checklist.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive 440-line validation checklist for the Architect agent to verify technical design, scalability, security, and alignment with PRD before development begins.

nodes.name: change-checklist.md
nodes.summary: Interactive checklist guiding agents and users through analysis and planning when a significant project change (pivot, tech issue, or failed story) is identified during the BMad workflow.

nodes.name: pm-checklist.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PM checklist ensuring PRDs and epic definitions are complete, user-centric, MVP-scoped, and technically feasible before handoff.

nodes.name: po-master-checklist.md
nodes.summary: Master PO validation checklist that adapts for greenfield vs brownfield projects and UI vs service-only scope to validate artifacts before development execution.

nodes.name: story-dod-checklist.md
nodes.summary: Definition of Done checklist for developer agents to self-validate story completion (code quality, tests, standards) before marking a story ready for review.

nodes.name: story-draft-checklist.md
nodes.summary: Scrum Master checklist validating that a story draft contains sufficient clarity, context, technical guidance, and testability before implementation begins.
